name: White Cliff Minerals Limited
analysis: WCN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 39% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.0170, stop A$0.0129, target A$0.0190 (0.48:1) — then trail it.
